title: clusia studartiana
intro: Clusia studartiana, also known as the 'Tetrasperma' or 'Amazonian clusia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is native to the Amazon rainforest and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Clusia studartiana, such as infusions and extracts, are used in folk medicine to treat various conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
